specs.name: alpha_idea_1
specs.description:
volume dislocation alpha. Memory: alpha_idea_2_mut2; alpha_idea_1; alpha_idea_2; alpha_idea_1_mut1; alpha_idea_2_mut2. Search: 重点探索以下空白领域: momentum, mean_reversion, microstructure, volatility, volume, liquidity, cross_sectional, event_driven, sentiment, flow, orderbook
推荐探索方向: medium 方向（历史成功率高）, low 方向（历史成功率高）, momentum, mean_reversion, microstructure
历史成功模式: medium 类因子成功率较高 (98/50), 关键词 'from' 在success中频繁出现 (50/50), 关键词 'demo' 在success中频繁出现 (48/50), 关键词 'evaluation' 在success中频繁出现 (48/50)
已有因子(39个)，避免重复. Candidate #1.
specs.implementation_stub:
def compute_alpha_idea_1(df):
    volume_ratio = df['volume'] / df['volume'].rolling(20).mean()
    abs_ret = df['close'].pct_change().abs()
    signal = ((volume_ratio - volume_ratio.rolling(20).mean()) / volume_ratio.rolling(20).std()) * -((abs_ret - abs_ret.rolling(20).mean()) / abs_ret.rolling(20).std())
    return signal
